note: This file lists every external/visual resource referenced in index.html and style.css. No files are embedded as binaries — images are hotlinked from Unsplash, fonts from Google Fonts, and icons/logo/animated badge are hand-drawn inline SVG (no downloads needed for those).

images.source: Unsplash (placeholder — replace with licensed/owned photo before production use)

images.alt: Margherita pizza fresh from the oven
Assorted sushi rolls on a wooden board

icons_and_logo.type: inline SVG (hand-drawn, not a file — embedded directly in index.html)
icons_and_logo.description: A circular outline with a simple to-go bag / cloche silhouette, drawn as an SVG <path>, colored via CSS currentColor.
Circular 'stamp' with curved text path (HOT • FRESH • FAST • ON THE WAY) and a center countdown '20:00', rotates continuously via CSS keyframes.

how_to_customize.images: Swap any 'url' value above with your own hosted image (or a local path like 'images/burger.jpg') and update the matching src= in index.html.
how_to_customize.fonts: To self-host fonts instead of Google Fonts, download the .woff2 files and replace the <link> tags in index.html with @font-face rules in style.css.
how_to_customize.logo: Replace the inline SVG in the .logo elements with an tag pointing to your real logo file if you have one.
